author: ESPN YouTube
text:
ELIMINATION GAME ⚾️ Virginia vs. Southern Miss | Full Game Highlights | ESPN College Baseball
Watch the highlights as Virginia Cavaliers eliminate No. 9 Southern Miss Golden Eagles from the NCAA Baseball Tournament after picking up a 15-11 extra innings win in the Hattiesburg Regional.

author: ESPN YouTube
text:
EXTRA INNINGS 🍿 Texas Tech vs. Tennessee | Full Game Highlights | Women's College World Series
Watch the highlights as the Tennessee Lady Volunteers defeat the Texas Tech Red Raiders, 2-1, to advance to the National Semifinals of the Women’s College World Series. Karlyn Pickens had 6 strikeouts in 6.2 innings and Emma Clarke hit a walk-off home run to secure the victory for Tennessee.
